h336ff225g0f2fg4cd5g9dbagd9128b2c4afd: We treat the spiders real kind, ma'am. Feed 'em the plumpest prisoners.
ha8ca6cb7g88ddg4e14gbe41g56f917be5ae3: We treat the real spiders real kind, sir. Feed 'em the plumpest prisoners.
h0682f4abg8f3dg4e4fg93b7ga40b6c28424d: Another outsider come to see the boss?
h9e69bd69g3d32g4868gbb8cg7564fc306b2f: Mind yer manners, now - or he'll throw ya in the pit.
h6badbcc0g03e1g4c2fg9811gdd922af56079: Dunno what the Absolute wants with your kind. She's already got us.
